title: Enum Match
description: Create an enum representing different shapes and use a match expression to calculate their area.
problemStatement:
Variants in action! Define an enum `Message` with variants `Quit`, `Move { x: i32, y: i32 }`, and `Write(String)`. Write a function that matches on the enum and prints a unique message for each variant.

**Requirement:** Use the `match` keyword to handle all variants.
hints: Rust enums can hold data within each variant, making them much more powerful than enums in other languages.
expectedOutput: Distinct text based on the variant provided
